prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: promotional video opening frame
Primary request: a premium cinematic product shot of the BuskerKing app interface floating in a dark concert-inspired digital space
Scene/background: black background with subtle haze, layered neon light streaks, and soft particles suggesting a live street music atmosphere
Subject: polished mobile and desktop app screens for a busking platform, with a bold hero title area and elegant Korean interface accents
Style/medium: high-end 3D motion-graphics still frame, glossy UI showcase
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 composition, central hero screen with supporting screens receding into depth, generous safe space for later title overlays
Lighting/mood: premium, energetic, optimistic nightlife mood
Color palette: black, indigo, electric purple, hot pink, cool blue
Text (verbatim): "BuskerKing"
Constraints: no real people, no human faces, no copyrighted characters, no watermark, text must be minimal and sharp
Avoid: distorted UI, unreadable text, clutter, stock-photo vibe, oversaturated bloom

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: promotional video mid cut
Primary request: show the audience side of BuskerKing discovering a street artist, following them, and exploring upcoming performances
Scene/background: a sleek digital city-night interface environment with map hints, artist profile cards, and event panels
Subject: app screens featuring artist discovery, follow state, performance list, and social proof, presented as premium product UI panels
Style/medium: polished app marketing render, cinematic UI still
Composition/framing: wide horizontal layout with one dominant profile screen left and supporting discovery cards right
Lighting/mood: exciting, social, urban, modern
Color palette: charcoal black, indigo, magenta accents, cool white
Constraints: no real people, no faces, no copyrighted logos, no watermark, make the interface feel shippable and premium
Avoid: messy layouts, tiny illegible labels, generic phone mockup cliché, excessive lens flare

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: promotional video action cut
Primary request: show a live performance interaction scene in BuskerKing with song request, points, follow, and live session energy represented through interface design only
Scene/background: dark live-mode interface environment with glowing UI cards, waveform hints, and subtle crowd-light ambience
Subject: a mobile-first live performance screen with setlist, song request action, points counter, and follow button emphasized
Style/medium: crisp premium UI marketing still, motion-design aesthetic
Composition/framing: dramatic close-up on the live mobile screen with secondary floating panels around it, widescreen composition
Lighting/mood: high-energy, immersive, realtime concert atmosphere
Color palette: black, violet, electric blue, amber highlights
Constraints: no real people, no faces, no copyrighted icons, no watermark, keep the UI clean and legible
Avoid: text glitches, crowded overlays, noisy effects, fake hands holding the phone, low-res interface

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: promotional video closing feature cut
Primary request: show the creator side of BuskerKing with singer dashboard, QR profile card, booking conversion, follower growth, and revenue tools in one elegant command-center composition
Scene/background: premium desktop control-room style digital backdrop with layered cards and a subtle performance-night glow
Subject: dashboard screens featuring performance management, booking tools, QR identity card, points, and follower insights
Style/medium: sophisticated startup product ad still, glossy interface render
Composition/framing: wide dashboard hero composition with a strong primary desktop panel and supporting floating cards around it
Lighting/mood: confident, professional, empowering
Color palette: midnight black, indigo, sapphire blue, warm amber accents
Constraints: no real people, no faces, no copyrighted logos, no watermark, keep the screens believable and high-end
Avoid: clutter, unreadable charts, random meaningless widgets, overdone cyberpunk effects, distorted perspective
